'''kofadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zinckiferous|zinckiferous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zinckiferous|zinckiferous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kofadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kofadhithi|kofadhithi]] || [[word:kofadhiji|kofadhiji]] || [[word:kofadhishi|kofadhishi]] || [[word:kofadhiki|kofadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kofadhuthuthu|kofadhuthuthu]] || [[word:kofadhujuju|kofadhujuju]] || [[word:kofadhushushu|kofadhushushu]] || [[word:kofadhukuku|kofadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kofadhuthu|kofadhuthu]] || [[word:kofadhuju|kofadhuju]] || [[word:kofadhushu|kofadhushu]] || [[word:kofadhuku|kofadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kofadhufthuf|kofadhufthuf]] || [[word:kofadhufjuf|kofadhufjuf]] || [[word:kofadhufshuf|kofadhufshuf]] || [[word:kofadhufkuf|kofadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kofadhethe|kofadhethe]] || [[word:kofadheje|kofadheje]] || [[word:kofadheshe|kofadheshe]] || [[word:kofadheke|kofadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kofadhothotho|kofadhothotho]] || [[word:kofadhojojo|kofadhojojo]] || [[word:kofadhoshosho|kofadhoshosho]] || [[word:kofadhokoko|kofadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kofadhotho|kofadhotho]] || [[word:kofadhojo|kofadhojo]] || [[word:kofadhosho|kofadhosho]] || [[word:kofadhoko|kofadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kofadhofthof|kofadhofthof]] || [[word:kofadhofjof|kofadhofjof]] || [[word:kofadhofshof|kofadhofshof]] || [[word:kofadhofkof|kofadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kofadhïfthïf|kofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfjïf|kofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfshïf|kofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfkïf|kofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kofadhïfthïfthïf|kofadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfjïfjïf|kofadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfshïfshïf|kofadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfkïfkïf|kofadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kofadhïfthïf|kofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfjïf|kofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfshïf|kofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfkïf|kofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kofadhïfthïf|kofadhïfthïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfjïf|kofadhïfjïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfshïf|kofadhïfshïf]] || [[word:kofadhïfkïf|kofadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kofadhæthæ|kofadhæthæ]] || [[word:kofadhæjæ|kofadhæjæ]] || [[word:kofadhæshæ|kofadhæshæ]] || [[word:kofadhækæ|kofadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kofadhathatha|kofadhathatha]] || [[word:kofadhajaja|kofadhajaja]] || [[word:kofadhashasha|kofadhashasha]] || [[word:kofadhakaka|kofadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kofadhatha|kofadhatha]] || [[word:kofadhaja|kofadhaja]] || [[word:kofadhasha|kofadhasha]] || [[word:kofadhaka|kofadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kofadhafthaf|kofadhafthaf]] || [[word:kofadhafjaf|kofadhafjaf]] || [[word:kofadhafshaf|kofadhafshaf]] || [[word:kofadhafkaf|kofadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kofadhasha|kofadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kofadhshësha|kofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kofadhrosha|kofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kofadhmusha|kofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kofadhyasha|kofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokofadhnkshësha|gokofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokofadhnkrosha|gokofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokofadhnkmusha|gokofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokofadhnkyasha|gokofadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kofafadhasha|kofafadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kofafadhshësha|kofafadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kofafadhrosha|kofafadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kofafadhmusha|kofafadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kofafadhyasha|kofafadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokofafadhnkshësha|gokofafadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokofafadhnkrosha|gokofafadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokofafadhnkmusha|gokofafadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokofafadhnkyasha|gokofafadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kefædhasha|kefædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kefædhshësha|kefædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kefædhrosha|kefædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kefædhmusha|kefædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kefædhyasha|kefædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokefædhnkshësha|gokefædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokefædhnkrosha|gokefædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokefædhnkmusha|gokefædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokefædhnkyasha|gokefædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kofadhasha|kofadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kofadhshësha|kofadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kofadhrosha|kofadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kofadhmusha|kofadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kofadhyasha|kofadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokofadhnkshësha|gokofadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokofadhnkrosha|gokofadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokofadhnkmusha|gokofadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokofadhnkyasha|gokofadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
